title: Tomsk, Tomsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tomsk, Tomsk Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tomsk is a city in Tomsk Oblast with a population of 570,000. Siberia’s oldest scientific and educational center, a historic city with well-preserved wooden architecture and top universities.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
